## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Docs / process / CI only
- [ ] Runtime code change (server, firmware, beamer)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked an issue or explained why none exists.
- [ ] I checked impact on existing workflows.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I added or updated diary entry in `diary/<branch>/NNN-title.md`.
- [ ] I did not include secrets or local credentials.

## Bootstrap-Phase Guardrails

- [ ] This PR does not add production implementation unless explicitly requested.
- [ ] CI remains focused on repository quality gates.

## Validation

List what was validated locally or in CI.

## Technical Debt Notes

If this introduces debt, add follow-up items and reference a `tech-debt` issue.
